arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona LIVE: Possible lineups and latest news
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome along to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the Champions League clash between Borussia Dortmund and Barcelona from Signal Iduna Park in Germany. Meanwhile, Barcelona's European form contrasts with their slightly shaky domestic performances.

arts.ttl: What does Borussia Dortmund’s motto ‘Echte Liebe’ mean?
arts.sum: You could say that ‘ Echte Liebe ’ is a short and concise motto, since its literal translation into English is simply “ true love ”. Having been a regular in the tournament over the past thirty years (today’s game will be the team’s 189th), fans are used to reading or hearing the motto ‘ Echte Liebe ’, which has been used by BVB fans and players since 2009.

arts.ttl: Barcelona have already made a decision on Vitor Roque’s future
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have already come to what is essentially a definitive decision on Vitor Roque’s future with the club. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Barcelona stars reveal favourite music artists with Spotify Wrapped
arts.sum: Barcelona's listening habits have been revealed with Spotify Wrapped.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund take on Barcelona in the Champions League this evening with both teams aiming to edge closer to the knockout rounds. Sixth and seventh in the standings heading into Wednesday night’s fixtures, a victory for either would be a giant step towards securing a place in the top eight. Dortmund are without Max Beier […] The post Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick hails ‘extraordinary’ Barcelona youngster ahead of Dortmund clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has this week moved to reiterate once more his appreciation for the talents of Lamine Yamal. Wide-man Lamine, for his part, is of course fresh…

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'cool interest' in 101-goal striker amid concerns over his 'style of play'
arts.sum: Barcelona allegedly cool their interest in Lille striker Jonathan David due to concerns over his style of play.

arts.ttl: Barca boss Flick handed two-match ban for Betis red card
arts.sum: It’s now been confirmed that he’s been banned for two games, meaning he will not be on the touchline for La Liga matches against Leganes and Atletico Madrid. The German was shown a straight red card for his reaction to a penalty being awarded against his side for a challenge by Frenkie de Jong on Vitor Roque.

Dani Olmo can leave club for free in January without registration in three weeks - Football España With the hamstring injury that needed surgery now behind him, the Uruguayan defender has been included in the Barça squad for the game against Borussia Dortmund.
